title: Cobblemon ExpLock Reborn
description: A server side mod to lock a pokémon's exp gain
body:
Updated version of https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-explock for Cobblemon 1.7.x

# Cobblemon ExpLock
A server side mod to lock a pokémon's exp gain. No need to be installed on client but its working in singleplayer too.

## Installation
Put the .jar file in the "mods" folder - requires Cobblemon and Fabric API.

## Commands
**/explock** <partyslot> [level]

Example: locking my first pokémon exp gain will be: /explock 1

Example 2: locking my first pokémon to level 50 will be: /explock 1 50

**/explockstatus** <partyslot>
Shows status info about explock on target slot.

## Permissions
By default the commands can be run by default users. 

This mod supports LuckPerms, and the permissions to use are: **explock.toggle** and **explock.status**
